title: Ghoti computer-use action plan (N+6.29A)
description: Input plan for ghoti_computer_use_adapter.py --plan <file> --dry-run. Describes a proposed computer-use action sequence. The adapter validates the plan and returns a dry-run status payload; it does NOT perform any real OS action.

plan_id.description: Unique identifier for this action plan.

milestone.description: Ghoti milestone this plan belongs to (e.g. N+6.29A).

target.description: Target type. Must be local_sandbox or approved_window. External targets are blocked.

window_id.description: Optional: identifier of an approved local window (e.g. dashboard, sandbox HTML page).

target_url.description: Optional: URL of the target. Must start with file://, http://localhost, or http://127.0.0.1. External URLs are blocked.

auto_submit.description: Must be false. Auto-submit is always blocked.

requires_human_approval.description: Must be true. All computer-use action plans require explicit human approval before any real execution.

capabilities_required.description: Optional: capabilities this plan requires. Blocked capabilities cause the plan to be rejected.

actions.description: Ordered list of proposed actions. Each action is validated; blocked types cause the plan to be rejected.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action within the plan.

type.description: Action type. Only the listed dry-run types are allowed.

target_element.description: Optional: CSS selector, element ID, or named target in the local sandbox.

value.description: Optional: value to use in the action (e.g. text to type in dry-run mode). Must not contain secrets, tokens, or credentials.

description.description: Optional: human-readable description of this action's purpose.
Optional: human-readable description of this plan's purpose.
